description.value:
You have impeccable control over your natural flames and wield them to excellent effect during battle. You gain the critical specialization effects for your burning tendril and solar flare unarmed attacks (whichever you possess). In addition, you gain one of the following benefits of your choice.

  • Broad Flame: Your burning tendril gains the sweep trait.
  • Empowered Flame: Your burning tendril gains the boost 1d8 trait.
  • Explosive Flare: Your solar flare releases a small burst of flame on a hit, dealing 1 fire damage per weapon damage die to all creatures adjacent to the target.
  • Long-Range Flare: Your solar flare's range increment increases by 15 feet.

Special You can take this feat twice, selecting from the benefits you haven't yet chosen.

value.value: Ancestral Unarmed Attack (burning tendril or solar flare)
